findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `TopSubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:52:@[expose] def subgroupFiberOrbitMapToFiberOrbit`; the same file already provides representative and compatibility API at lines 60, 68, 107, 117, and 137.
findings.fix: Remove `@[expose]`; keep the body opaque and rely on `subgroupFiberOrbitMapToFiberOrbit_apply`, `_top`, `_apply_eq_iff`, `_eq_iff`, and `_mapOfLE` for use downstream, adding any missing lemma instead of exposing the body.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitMapToFiberOrbit` is marked `@[expose]`, exposing its implementation as `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientTopEquiv ∘ subgroupFiberOrbitMapOfLE` even though consumers only need the named map and its characteristic lemmas.

summary: The new forgetting map has the right characteristic lemmas, but its body is unnecessarily exposed as public API.
